entities.name: V
entities.context: Vrijen - the person whose knowledge system this documents; being asked for structured metadata

entities.name: Capability Documentation System
entities.context: Structured metadata gathering system for capturing capabilities with standardized questions (Q2-Q7)

entities.name: N5/capabilities/
entities.context: File path structure where capabilities are stored (e.g., N5/capabilities/internal/meeting-pipeline-v2.md)

entities.name: Prompts/
entities.context: Entry point type for prompt-based capabilities; stored in Prompts/ directory

entities.name: N5/scripts/
entities.context: Entry point type for script-based capabilities; stored in N5/scripts/ directory

entities.name: Integration
entities.context: One of the six capability categories (integration, internal, workflow, orchestrator, agent, site)

entities.name: Internal
entities.context: One of the six capability categories for internal-facing tools/systems

entities.name: Workflow
entities.context: One of the six capability categories for procedural/workflows

entities.name: Orchestrator
entities.context: One of the six capability categories for coordination/orchestration systems

entities.name: Agent
entities.context: One of the six capability categories for agent-based capabilities

entities.name: Site
entities.context: One of the six capability categories for site/web-based capabilities

entities.name: Entry Points
entities.context: Key interfaces/access methods for a capability (prompt, script, URL)

relationships.context: V is asked to provide structured metadata through this system's Q2-Q7 questions
Capabilities are stored as files under the N5/capabilities/ path structure
Q7 captures entry points (prompt, script, URL) that define how to access each capability
Prompt-type entry points reference files in the Prompts/ directory
Script-type entry points reference files in the N5/scripts/ directory
Integration is a valid category value in Q3
Internal is a valid category value in Q3
Workflow is a valid category value in Q3
Orchestrator is a valid category value in Q3
Agent is a valid category value in Q3
Site is a valid category value in Q3
